Red Dragon
Challenge
Fire Hustle Totem

Once in a while over 5 sec, when attacking, the unit fires a lightning bolt at a random enemy. The lightning bolt deals 100000 magic damage and electrifies the target for 5 sec. Whenever an electrified unit uses an ability, that unit is stunned for 1 sec.

Requirements: 90
